author: doll-agent
content: Add 6 property tests covering missing integer types in tests/property_tests.rs: prop_npy_u16_roundtrip, prop_npy_u32_roundtrip, prop_npy_u64_roundtrip, prop_npy_u128_roundtrip, prop_npy_i16_roundtrip, prop_npy_i128_roundtrip. Pattern matches existing u8/i32/i64 tests: any::<T>(), 0..=100 elements, 256 cases each.
